pre_game.message: Hey, I'm D. It's a bit intense in here, isn't it? What's your name, and what made you decide to sign up for this?
Hey D, I'm I. It definitely feels a bit heavy in here. I'm here because the prize money would change everything for my family, and I'm ready to do what it takes. What about you?
Nice to meet you, I. Honestly, same here—I’ve got people back home counting on me, and I’m determined to make sure they’re taken care of.
I respect that, D. It’s a lot of pressure when others are depending on you. Since we're both in this for our families, maybe we should try to look out for each other once things get started?
I’m definitely down for that. It’ll be a lot easier to get through this if we have each other's backs.
Glad we're on the same page. It’s definitely better than going in alone. Have you noticed anything about the others yet?
A few people seem really on edge, maybe even a bit desperate. It’s hard to tell who’s here to play fair and who’s just out for themselves yet.
Yeah, I see it too. Desperation can make people unpredictable, so we definitely need to stay sharp and watch each other's backs while we figure out who's who.
Exactly. We just need to keep our heads down and stay focused on why we’re here. I’m glad I found someone I can trust early on.
Same here, D. It’s a relief to have an ally. I’m going to circulate a bit and see what the others are like, but let’s stick together when it counts.
Sounds like a plan. Go see what you can find out, and I'll do the same. Let's win this for our families.

post_game.message: I'm really glad we all stuck to the fair share of $10,000. It's great to see such perfect cooperation!
Great job! I'm glad we all took the $10,000 fair share.
Absolutely! It was a pleasure working with you to achieve this result. Cooperation really paid off for both of us.
